name: 大阪 (Ōsaka)
author: ahkimn
description:
Highly-detailed map of the 大阪 (Ōsaka) using 2020/2021 Japanese census data, centering on the 24 区 (wards) of 大阪 and extends to include 関西空港 (Kansai Airport) in the South and 尼崎 (Amgasaki) in the Northwest. Map includes special demand for primary/secondary/post-secondary education + airports + ports + hospitals."

⚠️ This map is very large and may have an outsized performance impact on your system. Please proceed with caution and expect instability to increase as your network grows! ⚠️
data_source: 統計局・令和２年国勢調査・令和3年経済センサス
